name: Laredo Oil, Inc.
summary: Laredo Oil, Inc., a management services company, manages the acquisition and operation of mature oil fields, and recovers stranded oil from those fields using enhanced oil recovery methods. The company was formerly known as Laredo Mining, Inc. and changed its name to Laredo Oil, Inc. in October 2009. Laredo Oil, Inc. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Golden, Colorado.
